title: Guttertank Origin
description: With the Guttertank Origin, you can play as the bulky, humanoid machine with bright red armor from the popular fast-paced FPS game ULTRAKILL
body:
The **Guttertank** is a heavily armored, high-mobility machine that acts like a piece of living artillery. With it's iconic bright red armor, it reeked havoc in the devastating Final War which caused the extinction of all life on the planet, turning it into a barren battleground. With this Origin, you get to experience what it's like to be one of these destructive machines from the world of **_ULTRAKILL_**. Created for the **Cog in the Wheel** Jam on the Origins Discord Server! Guttertank skin created by [tankilord57](https://www.minecraftskins.com/skin/22384159/guttertank) Icon and custom resource bars created by ElectricTaco ### **Resource Pack required** ### **Apulgi and Pehkui required** ![Guttertank image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf782613efc1dcca5e4c1190e556ac6c3d26328.webp) ## Abilities:
Spoiler

Rocket Launcher:

Primary

You possess on your right arm a large rocket launcher, which allows you to fire devastating rockets at your opponents causing tremendous damage to the environment.

Tank Fist:

Secondary

You can swing your fist at your opponent after a short windup. This melee attack has considerable knockback, range and damage, although missing will cause you to trip, leaving you vulnerable to attacks.

Land Mines:

Sneak & Load Toolbar Activator

You are also able to defuse your placed landmines by standing on top of them and pressing Save Hotbar Activator

You can lay down a landmine that causes significant damage to whoever steps too close to it. Placed landmines can't be set off by you.

Blood Regeneration:

You are a machine that runs primarily on Blood. Thus, killing enemies grants you regeneration and strength for a short while.

Bulky Appearance:

You appear as a large, red tank-like robot. Your bulkiness grants you natural health and armor but leaves vulnerable in water as you immediately sink to the bottom.

Structural Integrity:

Your tank-like physique makes you immune to knockback but leaves you vulnerable to explosions, especially from other rockets.

Frightening Form:

Due to your menacing appearance, Villagers refuse to trade with you and Iron Golems attack you on sight. Additionally, Illagers refuse to attack you unless provoked by you.

No Shield/Elytra:

You require your left arm to be free at all times to punch things and set up landmines so Shields are out of the question. Additionally, you are way to heavy to use Elytras.

Guttertank Skin:

Double tap List Players key

You have the option to enable/disable your Gutterman Skin
